response.justification: While Bogdan has broad engineering experience and exposure to event-driven systems and some AI-agent tooling, he lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership in scale-up fintech with production multi-agent AI systems, regulatory AI deployment, or engineering team scaling beyond 10 people — key pillars of the CTO role. His roles are largely individual contributor or founder-level, with no evidence of owning architectural domains, governing hybrid engineering models, or leading teams through the complexity of real-time credit risk or working-capital AI systems.
strengths: Exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong backend and event-driven system experience with DLang and Node.js
Proven ability to build and open-source complex infrastructure (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated AI systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No visible track record in real-time inference, ML feature engineering, or AI reliability pipelines for financial decisioning

key_factors.factor: Senior leadership in scale-up AI systems
